name: South Bend Park
description:
Drive past the picnic pavilions to the parking lot next to the courts. Tall trees on the west side provide afternoon shade but leaf debris year round.

Lights turn on when it almost gets too dark to play and stays on until 11pm.

Alternate entrance to the parking area is from South Bend Center for the Arts.
1955 Compton Dr SE, Atlanta, GA 30315

Restrooms are available there when they are open M-F, 10am to 6pm.
